description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. The structure includes a flat roof with a partially slatted overhang, providing shade to a spacious upper terrace enclosed by a metal railing. Large windows are present on the upper floor, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The ground level is partially open, possibly serving as a carport or covered entry, and the main entryway is recessed for added privacy. The terrace is finished with patterned tiles and outdoor furniture, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. Minimalist detailing and a lack of ornamentation emphasize the contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, white, boxy house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious upper terrace enclosed by metal railings. The design is minimalist, with a partially open ground level and a shaded outdoor living area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid white facade, a large window, and the terrace with metal railing on the right.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the upper terrace with patterned tiles, outdoor furniture, and the slatted roof overhang.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the terrace, slatted roof, and additional windows on the upper floor.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying large windows on the upper floor and the open ground level, possibly a carport or entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on upper floor
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with minimal detailing, partially open ground level, no porch or decorative columns
